sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js - Enhanced Attractive Design import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } // Extract data from API response const apiData = dashboardData.individualResult || {}; // Enhanced data with dynamic values from API const analysisData = { churnRisk: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10, retentionProbability: Math.round((1 - (apiData.probability || 0)) * 1000) / 10, riskLevel: apiData.risk_level || "low", confidence: 92, executiveSummary: { riskProbability: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10, category: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "critical" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "monitoring" : "stable", riskLevel: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "high immediate risk" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "moderate risk" : "low immediate risk", recommendation: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "immediate intervention required" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "proactive monitoring recommended" : "proceeding directly to the action plan below", primaryRiskFactor: apiData.top_driver || "general behavior" }, comparisonMetrics: { churnRisk: { current: `${Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10}%`, target: "<15%", comparison: apiData.probability > 0.15 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0) * 1000) / 10 }, tenure: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5} mo`, target: ">12 mo", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5) > 12 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5 }, daysSinceOrder: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7} d`, target: "<7 d", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7) > 7 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7 }, satisfaction: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3}/5`, target: ">4/5", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3) > 4 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3 } }, businessImpact: apiData.business_impact ? { estimatedCV: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.estimated_clv || 16250).toLocaleString()}`, retentionBudget: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.retention_budget || 813).toLocaleString()}`, potentialLoss: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.potential_revenue_loss || 2624).toLocaleString()}`, roiPotential: `${Math.round((apiData.business_impact.roi_retention || 2.2) * 10) / 10}x` } : { estimatedCV: "₹16,250", retentionBudget: "₹813", potentialLoss: "₹2,624", roiPotential: "2.2x" } }; // Enhanced Risk Header Component const RiskHeader = () => (

Churn Risk Analysis Report

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK ({analysisData.churnRisk}%) Primary risk factor identified as {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}.
{analysisData.churnRisk}% Churn Risk
); // Enhanced Executive Summary Component const ExecutiveSummary = () => (
📋

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This customer is currently evaluated at a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskProbability}% churn probability and is categorized as {analysisData.executiveSummary.category} and poses a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskLevel}. We recommend {analysisData.executiveSummary.recommendation}.

🎯
{analysisData.retentionProbability}% Retention Probability
🛡️
{analysisData.confidence}% Model Confidence
); // Enhanced Metric Card Component const MetricCard = ({ title, current, target, comparison, value, type }) => (

{title}

{comparison === 'Above Target' ? '↑' : '↓'} {comparison}
{current}
Target: {target}
0 {type === 'churnRisk' ? '100%' : type === 'tenure' ? '12mo' : type === 'satisfaction' ? '5' : '0d'}
); // Enhanced Business Impact Component const BusinessImpact = () => (
💼

Business Impact Analysis

💰
{analysisData.businessImpact.estimatedCV}
Estimated Customer Value
🛡️
{analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
Retention Budget
⚠️
{analysisData.businessImpact.potentialLoss}
Potential Loss
📈
{analysisData.businessImpact.roiPotential}
ROI Potential
); // Enhanced Recommendations Component const Recommendations = () => (
🎯

Recommended Actions

{apiData.recommendations && apiData.recommendations.map((rec, index) => (
{index + 1}
{rec.split(':')[0]}
{rec.split(':')[1]}
{index === 0 ? 'High Priority' : index === 1 ? 'Medium Priority' : 'Low Priority'}
))}
); // Enhanced Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Risk Header */} {/* Executive Summary */} {/* Comparison Metrics */}
📊

Performance Metrics

{/* Business Impact */} {/* Recommendations */} {apiData.recommendations && }
); return (

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Advanced predictive analytics for customer retention

{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()} {activeTab === 'detailed' && (

Detailed Feature Analysis

Coming soon - Detailed breakdown of all features and their impact on churn prediction.

)} {activeTab === 'action' && (

Retention Action Plan

Coming soon - Customized retention strategies based on risk level.

)}
); } export default Dashboard;
